description_long: This bungalow features an L-shaped layout with a prominent cross-hipped roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden siding, with a mix of natural wood tones and darker trim accents. Large, vertically oriented windows dominate the central section, providing ample natural light and a modern touch. A covered carport or garage is integrated into one wing, supported by sturdy posts and open on one side. The structure includes a visible porch area beneath the roof overhang, offering sheltered outdoor space. The overall design blends traditional bungalow proportions with contemporary window arrangements and materials.
description: An L-shaped, wood-clad bungalow with a cross-hipped shingle roof, large vertical windows, and an integrated carport and porch.
description_view_0: This view highlights the covered carport on the left, the main entrance area, and the large vertical windows beneath the roof overhang.
description_view_1: This angle shows the prominent cross-hipped roof, the full expanse of the large windows, and the open gable structure of the carport.
description_view_2: The rear side is visible here, showing the continuous wooden siding and minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: This view displays the long, uninterrupted back facade with horizontal wood siding and no visible windows or doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped vertical windows on the front and minimal windows on the rear
